basic_details.job_title: Gauhati High Court Judicial Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Gauhati High Court Judicial Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website Gauhati High Court. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the Gauhati High Court Judicial Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 32 years Age Relaxation: ST: 5 years (upper limit 37 years); Government Employees: equal to years of service subject to max 5 years; PwBD: additional 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognized University, Working knowledge of Computer
qualification.details: Must be a graduate from a recognized University. Must have working knowledge of Computer.

salary_details.details: Pay Level 10: Rs. 37800 - 119700 Per Month + Grade Pay 4200

selection_process: Written Examination (100 marks) Interview/Viva voce (20 marks) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gauhati High Court to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Gauhati High Court Judicial Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 11th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Judicial Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a recognized University and possess a working knowledge of computers to be eligible for the Judicial Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Judicial Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Judicial Assistant post announced by the Gauhati High Court in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST candidates is Rs. 250/-. Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Judicial Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination, followed by an Interview/Viva voce, and finally, Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Judicial Assistant position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a salary in Pay Level 10, ranging from Rs. 37,800 to Rs. 1,19,700 per month, along with a Grade Pay of Rs. 4200.

faq.question: Q8. In which state is this recruitment being conducted?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted for the Gauhati High Court, with the posts located in Kohima, Nagaland.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the Gauhati High Court Judicial Assistant jobs?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of the Gauhati High Court or via the direct application link provided in the important links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for government employees?
faq.answer: Yes, government employees are eligible for age relaxation equivalent to their years of service, subject to a maximum of 5 years.
